reviews.comment:
Un desastre, todo sucio lleno de moscas jamás entre a una estación de ACA DE ESA MANERA, CASCARUDOS muertos en el piso, más chica que un almacén y las mesas y sillas al sol y a la lluvia. Es para que pasen a constatar, lo que digo . No pueden calentar nada aunque se veía un microondas sólo te ofrecen heladeras con poco frío sándwich a más de $1000  y gaseosas o galletitas. Me da vergüenza como Socio que nos traten tan mal , en la comida y café sin ningún descuento por ser socio. Sólo con QR Te cobran con mercado pago. VERGUENZA AJENA DE ESTE SERVICIO. ESTUBE AYER. tome un café y me fui!!!!
El playero no limpia vidrios del coche!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, filthy and full of flies. I've never been to an ACA station like that. Dead beetles on the floor, smaller than a corner store, and the tables and chairs were exposed to the sun and rain. Come and see for yourselves, I mean it. They can't heat anything up, even though there was a microwave. They only offer cold storage with sandwiches for over $1000 and sodas or cookies. As a member, I'm ashamed that they treat us so badly, with no member discounts on food or coffee. They only charge you with a QR code and Mercado Pago. This service is a disgrace. I was there yesterday. I had a coffee and left!
The attendant doesn't clean car windows!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNV9mVDBRRRAB
